sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: MVFG Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:MVFG
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index ETF (MVFG), including its current price, performance metrics, and key statistics like AUM and expense ratio. It explains MVFG's investment strategy, which focuses on equity ETFs with strong cash flow and adjusts to treasury ETFs during market downturns, and addresses frequently asked questions about ETFs and MVFG's specifics. The fund, issued by Kingsview Partners LLC, tracks the Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index and was launched on March 6, 2024.

feed.title: Reverse split at agilon health (NYSE: AGL) targets NYSE compliance
feed.summary: agilon health (NYSE: AGL) announced a 1-for-25 reverse stock split, effective March 30, 2026, with trading on a split-adjusted basis starting March 31, 2026. This action, approved by stockholders, aims to raise the company's share price above $1.00 to meet NYSE listing requirements and improve marketability. Approximately 16.6 million shares will be outstanding after the split, with fractional shares being cashed out.

feed.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock. The dividend will be payable on April 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 10, 2026. The company specializes in semiconductor solutions for data infrastructure technology.

feed.title: Marine Corps Enlisted Leaders Visit HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding to Advance Veteran-to-Shipbuilding Workforce Pipeline
feed.summary: Senior enlisted leaders from the U.S. Marine Corps visited HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division to strengthen the pipeline for transitioning Marines into shipbuilding careers. This collaboration highlights the shared values of discipline and technical aptitude between the Marine Corps and the shipbuilding industry, particularly given Ingalls' role in building amphibious warships crucial to Marine operations. Both organizations aim to ensure a seamless transition for veterans, recognizing the vital skills and leadership qualities they bring to the workforce.

feed.title: FedEx Reports Strong Third Quarter Results
feed.summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) reported strong third-quarter results for fiscal 2026, with revenue of $24.0 billion and adjusted diluted EPS of $5.25. The company raised its full-year fiscal 2026 earnings outlook and remains on track to spin off FedEx Freight on June 1, 2026. These positive results reflect disciplined operational execution, increased package yields and volume, and ongoing cost savings from transformation initiatives.

feed.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend Payment
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.06 per share of common stock. This dividend is payable on April 30, 2026, to stockholders of record as of April 10, 2026. The company specializes in data infrastructure technology and semiconductor solutions for various industries.

feed.title: Caterpillar Showcases New Industrial Engines and Power Systems at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026
authors: Caterpillar Inc. - Industrial Engines & Power Systems
feed.summary: Caterpillar Industrial Power Systems unveiled new engines and power solutions at CONEXPO-CON/AGG 2026. This included a higher-horsepower version of the Cat C3.6 engine, now delivering up to 173 hp, and the new C13D engine platform designed for heavy-duty off-highway equipment. Both engines are compliant with EU Stage V and U.S. EPA Tier 4 Final emissions standards and support the use of biodiesel and renewable fuels.

feed.title: Five airline stocks that fly in the face of soaring fuel costs
feed.summary: Despite soaring fuel costs, some airline companies are showing strong performance and dividend sustainability. This article identifies five such airline stocks: Delta Air Lines, Southwest Airlines, Singapore Airlines, Copa Holdings SA, and Deutsche Lufthansa AG. These airlines were selected based on their revenue growth, dividend payments, and the TSI Dividend Sustainability Rating System, which evaluates factors like continuous dividend payments, balance sheet strength, and earnings records.

feed.title: McDonald’s (NYSE: MCD) officer Dario Baroni sells 600 common shares
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation executive Dario Baroni sold 600 shares of company common stock in an open-market transaction at a price of $323.77 per share. Following this sale, Baroni directly owns 1,063.07 shares of McDonald's common stock. The transaction was detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, indicating it was made pursuant to a Rule 10b5-1(c) plan.

feed.title: Pfizer vs Moderna: Which Pharma Stock Has More Upside?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Pfizer (PFE) and Moderna (MRNA), comparing their upside potential as their COVID-19 vaccine sales decline. It highlights Moderna's smaller size and innovative mRNA pipeline as offering higher potential gains but also greater risk, while Pfizer is presented as a more stable, financially flexible company with a deep product portfolio and a strong dividend. The choice between the two depends on an investor's risk tolerance and financial goals.

feed.title: Deal wrap: Dallas unicorn locks in funding from JPMorgan
feed.summary: Dallas-based unicorn Lantern has secured $30 million in funding, led by a division of JPMorgan Chase. Additionally, private equity firm Lone Star Funds has successfully closed its latest residential mortgage fund, which is valued at a billion dollars. The article provides a brief overview of these significant financial deals in North Texas.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley downgrades Tencent Music stock rating on competition concerns
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley downgraded Tencent Music Entertainment Group (TME) to Equalweight from Overweight and reduced its price target significantly to $12.30 from $25.00, citing increased competition that has led to a sharp deceleration in the music streaming company's subscription revenue outlook. Other firms like UBS and Benchmark also downgraded TME due to competition and AI disruption risks. Despite a recent 25% stock plunge, InvestingPro data suggests the stock is undervalued with a Fair Value of $16.68.

feed.title: Bakers Online Are Saying Hershey’s Kisses Don’t Melt Anymore—So I Tried It Myself
feed.summary: Online bakers have been claiming that Hershey's Kisses no longer melt properly, citing issues like cracking and crumbling. The author tested this viral notion by making pretzel-and-Kiss candies, a classic treat. The experiment showed that the Hershey's Kisses melted beautifully, behaving exactly as expected, debunking the social media conspiracy theory.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants' sales continue to grow
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants significantly outperformed the industry in its third fiscal quarter, with sales growing 5.9% to $3.3 billion and consolidated same-store sales up 4.2% across its 11 brands. LongHorn Steakhouse led the growth with a 7.2% increase, while Olive Garden also saw a 3.2% rise driven by strong operational execution and new lighter menu options. The company forecasts continued growth for fiscal 2026, with total sales up 9.5% and 4.5% same-store sales growth.

feed.title: Prometheus lands $145M refi for Cupertino office campus
feed.summary: Prometheus Real Estate Group secured a $145 million refinancing deal from Wells Fargo for its Cupertino office campus, "The Towers," near Apple's headquarters. This financing will fund upgrades to the 357,000-square-foot office buildings at 20400 and 20450 Stevens Creek Boulevard, which are part of the larger Cupertino City Center mixed-use development. The move marks Prometheus's second refinancing of the property in a decade and continues ongoing modernization efforts aimed at meeting the needs of innovative Silicon Valley companies.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino, defending his company, takes star role at antitrust trial
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino testified in an antitrust trial, defending the company's dominant position against claims of greed and customer abuse. The lawsuit, brought by the U.S. Justice Department and continued by 33 states, alleges Live Nation and Ticketmaster shut out competitors and drove up prices. Rapino addressed controversial internal messages, problems with Taylor Swift ticket sales, and issues regarding concert seating and Adele's presale tickets, consistently defending his company's practices.

feed.title: LightInTheBox Holding Co., Ltd. (LITB) Leadership & Management Team Analysis
feed.summary: This article analyzes the leadership and management team of LightInTheBox Holding Co., Ltd. (LITB). It highlights that CEO Jian He, appointed in November 2018, owns 23.95% of the company's shares. The average tenure for the management team is 6.5 years and for the board of directors is 7.3 years, indicating an experienced leadership structure.

feed.title: LGI Homes Launches Spring Sales Event with Over $20,000 in Buyer Savings
feed.summary: LGI Homes has launched its Spring Sales Event across LGI Homes and Terrata Homes communities, offering homebuyers over $20,000 in potential savings on select move-in-ready homes. The event, running until April 26, 2026, includes special interest rates, closing cost assistance, and flexible "Flex Cash" for Terrata Homes buyers. This initiative aims to make homeownership more accessible by providing significant incentives to prospective buyers.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International Appoints Grant Michael Leingang to Lead Intellectual Property & Justice Communications
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has appointed Grant Michael Leingang as President of IP & Justice Communications, a new executive role. Leingang will be responsible for strengthening the company's intellectual property governance, cross-jurisdictional communication systems, and justice-aligned corporate messaging. This appointment highlights MGM's commitment to enhancing its communication architecture amid global expansion and regulatory partnerships.

feed.title: Ecolab near $4.5B+ deal for data center cooling company CoolIT, WSJ reports
feed.summary: Ecolab is reportedly nearing a deal to acquire CoolIT, a company specializing in liquid-cooling systems for data centers. The potential acquisition, valued between $4.5 billion and $5 billion, would position Ecolab in the growing market for AI-driven data center infrastructure. The news was first reported by The Wall Street Journal.

feed.title: Will the Fed Cut Rates This Year?
feed.summary: Economists Preston Caldwell and Valentina Djeljosevic discuss the Federal Reserve's dilemma in considering rate cuts amidst an oil shock, slowing growth, and rising inflation. Most Fed officials still predict at least one rate cut in 2026, but the economic uncertainties from the "Iran war" make a wait-and-see approach likely. They also address concerns about stagflation, with Caldwell clarifying that current conditions, while challenging, do not match the severe stagflation of the 1970s.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Sales Growth and Strategic Expansions
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants Inc (DRI) reported strong Q3 2026 results with a 5.9% increase in total sales and 4.2% same-restaurant sales growth across all segments, outperforming industry benchmarks. The company opened 16 new restaurants, with Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse showing positive growth despite challenges from winter weather and increased beef costs. Darden provided optimistic guidance for fiscal 2026, including projected sales growth of approximately 9.5% and adjusted diluted net earnings per share between $10.57 and $10.67.

feed.title: [144] IRON MOUNTAIN INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by IRON MOUNTAIN INC (IRM), indicating a proposed sale of securities. The filing specifies the class of securities (Common stock), the number of units to be sold (59,725), and their aggregate market value ($6,237,081.75). The securities were acquired through Restricted Stock Vesting on March 1, 2026, and the proposed sale date is March 19, 2026, via Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC on the NYSE.

feed.title: Cboe's JJ Kinahan on the launch of prediction markets
feed.summary: JJ Kinahan, Senior VP of Retail and Alternative Investments at Cboe Global Markets, joined 'Power Lunch' to discuss prediction markets and the current state of the retail investor. The segment delves into these topics, offering insights from a key Cboe executive.

feed.title: Longeviti Neuro Solutions Appoints T. Rowe Price CEO Robert W. Sharps to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Longeviti Neuro Solutions has appointed Robert W. Sharps, CEO and President of T. Rowe Price Group, Inc., to its Board of Directors. Sharps brings extensive experience in global asset management and corporate governance, which will support Longeviti's strategic growth, particularly in advancing its AI-enabled brain health platforms like ClearFit AI™. This appointment aims to bolster the company's clinical, commercial, and long-term therapeutic initiatives in neurotechnology.

feed.title: Strategic deals and satellite ambitions: SEALSQ stock gains 3.82%
feed.summary: SEALSQ Corp (LAES) saw its stock gain 3.82% to $3.13, despite remaining under key moving averages and showing strong oversold signals. The company is strategically partnering with WISeSat.Space to establish a 100-satellite quantum key distribution cloud and expanding collaboration with Parrot SA for post-quantum cryptography in drones, supported by a recent $125 million funding round. However, technical analysis suggests persistent bearish momentum, with expert Anton Kharitonov advising caution until the stock stabilizes above critical resistance levels.

feed.title: Marathon Digital stock: Moderate volatility near highs drives a 4.82% advance
feed.summary: Marathon Digital Holdings (MARA) saw its stock price rise by 4.82% to $9.35, showing short-term positive momentum despite a broader downtrend. Technical indicators suggest mixed signals, with moderate buying pressure intraday but persistent bearish risks for the longer term. Analysts predict a sideways consolidation between $8.94 and $9.29 for the next five trading days, with a potential for a short-term rally if it breaks above $9.29, or increased downside risk if it falls below $8.94.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz becomes NFL's first official condiment partner with 5-year global deal
feed.summary: Kraft Heinz and the NFL have announced a five-year global strategic partnership, making Kraft Heinz the league's first official condiment partner. This collaboration aims to boost fan engagement through stadium visibility, co-branding, limited-edition packaging, and immersive retail activations, while also helping the NFL expand its international reach. The partnership will kick off at the 2026 NFL Draft in Pittsburgh.

feed.title: Labor cost concerns, technicals mixed: Starbucks stock gains 3.60%
feed.summary: Starbucks stock gained 3.60% to $96.00 today despite mixed technical signals and concerns over increased labor costs impacting future margins. Institutional investors increased their positions in the third quarter, signaling confidence in the company's long-term outlook. Analysts suggest a sideways consolidation for the stock, with key levels to watch at $98.00 for upside and $93.00 for downside.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy Ltd stock hits 52-week high at 2.77 USD
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy Ltd (KOS) stock reached a new 52-week high of $2.77, reflecting a significant year-to-date return of 193% and investor confidence despite fluctuating energy markets. This surge occurred even after the company recently missed Q4 2025 financial forecasts and initiated stock offerings to address debt obligations. Analysts predict profitability this year, with BofA Securities raising its price target on the stock due to higher commodity prices.

feed.title: iShares Russell Mid-Cap ETF (NYSE:IWR) - Share Price and Research
feed.summary: This article provides current share price information and research for the iShares Russell Mid-Cap ETF (NYSE:IWR). It details the current share price, market capitalization, daily high and low, and movements over the past 7 days and 52 weeks. The article also includes information on the ETF's last dividend payment and average daily trading volume.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: monday.com Ltd. (MNDY) Shareholders Who Lost Mone
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is urging monday.com Ltd. (MNDY) shareholders who experienced losses between September 17, 2025, and February 6, 2026, to contact them regarding a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that monday.com made misleading statements and failed to disclose critical information about decelerating new customer growth, weaker expansion, and longer sales cycles, making their $1.8 billion 2027 revenue target unrealistic. Investors have until May 11, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion in this class action.

feed.title: Marcus Corporation to Participate at the 38th Annual ROTH Conference
feed.summary: Marcus Corporation announced that its chairman, president, and CEO, Gregory S. Marcus, along with CFO and Treasurer Chad M. Paris, will attend the 38th Annual ROTH Conference on March 23, 2026, in Dana Point, California. The invite-only event offers networking opportunities with various growth-sector companies. Marcus Corporation is a leader in entertainment and hospitality, operating Marcus Theatres and Marcus Hotels & Resorts.

feed.title: MAGN: Magnera targets $395M EBITDA and $100M free cash flow in 2026, prioritizing debt reduction
feed.summary: Magnera, a company formed from a 2024 merger, has completed its integration and is now a leader in specialty materials. The company has set financial targets for 2026, aiming for $395 million in Adjusted EBITDA and $100 million in free cash flow. A key focus for Magnera is debt reduction and achieving margin expansion through synergy realization and portfolio optimization.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices shares see a jump: what is fueling the stock rise
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares rose by 2.37% today to $204.18, driven by a strategic partnership with Samsung Electronics for AI memory chips and better-than-expected quarterly earnings. Despite institutional selling by Cim Investment Management Inc., these developments strengthen AMD's market position, though short-term technical resistance and mixed momentum signals suggest potential consolidation. Analysts highlight the importance of breaking above the $214.80 resistance level for continued growth.

feed.title: Southern Co (NYSE: SO) COO Stan Connally sells 12,500 company shares
feed.summary: Southern Company's Executive Vice President and COO, Stan W. Connally, sold 12,500 shares of company stock at $97.13 per share. This open-market transaction was detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing. Following the sale, Connally still directly holds 161,481 shares and indirectly holds an additional 15,562.7052 shares through a 401(k) plan.

feed.title: Alpacas, caviar and 14 DJs: Wynn turns residency reveal into film
feed.summary: Wynn Nightlife has released a cinematic short film titled "The Year of Excess," featuring 14 headline DJs and narrated by Rob Riggle. The in-house production showcases extravagant scenes across Wynn and Encore Las Vegas to promote their nightlife offerings, challenging traditional residency announcements. This initiative aligns with Wynn's broader strategy of experiential branding, aiming to enhance its non-gaming appeal alongside core resort operations.

feed.title: IZEA Worldwide Inc Aktie: Q4 2025 Earnings Turnaround Signals Profitability Path Amid Influencer Mar
feed.summary: IZEA Worldwide Inc (NASDAQ:IZEA) reported a significant turnaround in its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, achieving an $18.9 million net profit swing through strategic cost reductions and a focus on high-margin enterprise clients. The company stabilized revenue at $31.2 million annually while cutting operating expenses by 40%, ending the year with a debt-free balance sheet and $50.9 million in cash. This repositioning, coupled with upcoming AI-enhanced platforms, positions IZEA as a compelling growth opportunity within the rapidly expanding influencer marketing sector, particularly for investors in German-speaking markets.

feed.title: Airline stocks hinge on pricing power as carriers push through fare hikes, UBS says
feed.summary: UBS analysts report that the performance of major US airline stocks, including United Airlines, Delta, American Airlines, and Alaska Air Group, is increasingly dependent on their ability to maintain aggressive fare increases amidst surging fuel costs. Despite jet fuel prices nearing $4 per gallon, airlines are successfully implementing multiple fare hikes, leading to strong booked yields and revenue expectations. While this pricing power is currently offsetting higher fuel bills and supporting earnings outlooks for fiscal 2026, UBS cautions that the sustained durability of this power remains a key risk, especially if oil prices stay high and broader inflation impacts discretionary travel spending.

feed.title: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has announced that investors who suffered losses with Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (KD) have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Kyndryl's financial statements were materially misstated, it had inadequate internal controls, and consequently, would be unable to timely file its Quarterly Report for Q4 2025. Affected shareholders are encouraged to contact the law firm before the lead plaintiff deadline of April 13, 2026.

feed.title: Insider Rule 144 sales reported for MPC (MPC): four 25,000-share trades
feed.summary: Michael J. Hennigan has reported four separate sales of 25,000 shares each of Marathon Petroleum Corp. (MPC) under Rule 144 in February and March 2026, totaling over $20 million in gross proceeds. These transactions, filed through Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC, are dispositions by a holder and not direct company actions. The filing also details prior restricted stock vesting events for Hennigan.

feed.title: Citizens Financial (CZFS) director Joseph R. Landy makes bona fide 20-share gift
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Services Inc. director Joseph R. Landy reported a bona fide gift of 20 shares of common class stock. The shares were transferred at a price of $0.0000 per share as a non-derivative transaction, and after this gift, he directly holds 27,934.4652 shares. The transaction, filed as SEC Form 4, indicates a gift rather than a sale or purchase, and no derivative positions were involved.

feed.title: Methanex Soars as Price Targets Rally Amid Global Methanol Supply Concerns
feed.summary: Methanex Corporation (NASDAQ: MEOH) has seen its stock price rise by 8.06% due to increased price targets from Jefferies and BMO Capital, driven by global methanol supply constraints and rising spot prices. Despite a dip in Q4 adjusted EBITDA, the company increased methanol production and successfully integrated OCI Global’s methanol business. Analysts remain optimistic about Methanex's strategic position amid geopolitical tensions and its potential for sustained growth.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino, defending his company, takes star role at antitrust trial
feed.summary: Live Nation Entertainment CEO Michael Rapino testified in an antitrust trial in New York, defending the company's dominant position against accusations of greed and abusive practices by attorneys representing 33 states and the District of Columbia. Rapino addressed claims about shutting out competitors, driving up prices, and issues related to Taylor Swift and Adele ticket sales, attributing some problems to cyberattacks and safety concerns. He also responded to a controversial internal message from a Live Nation employee, calling it "disgusting" and stating plans to address it.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO’s Pay Tied to ‘Solving’ DOJ-Antitrust Problem
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino's compensation is significantly linked to addressing the Department of Justice's antitrust concerns, which threaten to break up the company. Approximately 90% of his pay, comprising a cash bonus and stock grant, is based on meeting profit targets and a "regulatory affairs" goal set by the board. Rapino made this disclosure during testimony in a federal antitrust trial.

feed.title: Jefferies Financial Group Has Lowered Expectations for Boyd Group Services (TSE:BYD) Stock Price
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has decreased its price target for Boyd Group Services (TSE:BYD) from C$275.00 to C$250.00, though this still suggests a potential upside of 31.55%. Despite a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of C$259.31 from analysts, the company's stock traded down to C$190.04, reflecting concerns over stretched fundamentals like a high P/E ratio of 256.81 and a high debt-to-equity ratio. Boyd Group Services reported C$1.04 billion in quarterly revenue but a slim net margin of 0.52%.

feed.title: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) Reaches New 12-Month Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Cintas (NASDAQ:CTAS) recently hit a new 52-week low of $178.78, trading below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Despite a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $220.25, the stock carries a premium valuation (P/E of 52.57) and a modest 1.0% dividend yield. The company reported a slight EPS beat and 9.3% revenue growth in its last quarterly earnings.

feed.title: Independent Bank Corporation and HCB Financial Corp. Announce Definitive Merger Agreement Valued at $70.2 Million
feed.summary: Independent Bank Corporation and HCB Financial Corp. have announced a definitive merger agreement valued at $70.2 million. This strategic move aims to expand Independent Bank's presence in Michigan, particularly in the corridor between Grand Rapids and Lansing, and will result in a combined entity with approximately $6.1 billion in total assets. The merger is expected to be accretive to Independent's 2027 earnings per share, bringing enhanced product offerings and a stronger funding profile.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Inovio Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (INO)
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is reminding investors of Inovio Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (INO) about an upcoming deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges securities fraud, citing drops in Inovio's stock price after announcements regarding delays in their BLA submission for INO-3107 and the FDA's decision for a standard review timeline instead of an accelerated one. Investors who purchased Inovio securities between October 10, 2023, and December 26, 2025, and suffered losses are urged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern (NSC): Evercore ISI Group Raises Price Target to $295 | NSC Stock News
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has increased its price target for Norfolk Southern (NSC) to $295 from $292, while maintaining an "In-Line" rating. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook, despite varied opinions and recent price target adjustments from other analysts. The consensus among 18 analysts sets an average target price of $313.96 for NSC, implying a 12.23% upside from its current price, though GuruFocus estimates a 9.5% downside based on its GF Value.
